testcase.name: test_post_internal_message
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_chat_inventory.py:117: in test_post_internal_message assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 401: {"detail":"Not authenticated","status_code":401} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_post_customer_message
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_chat_inventory.py:131: in test_post_customer_message assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 401: {"detail":"Not authenticated","status_code":401} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_get_internal_messages_after_post

failure.message: AssertionError: Should have at least one test message assert 0 >= 1 + where 0 = len([])

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_chat_inventory.py:146: in test_get_internal_messages_after_post assert len(test_messages) >= 1, "Should have at least one test message" E AssertionError: Should have at least one test message E assert 0 >= 1 E + where 0 = len([])

testcase.name: test_invalid_channel_returns_400

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 400 for invalid channel, got 401 assert 401 == 400 + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_chat_inventory.py:155: in test_invalid_channel_returns_400 assert response.status_code == 400, f"Expected 400 for invalid channel, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 400 for invalid channel, got 401 E assert 401 == 400 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_chat_inventory.py:176: in test_get_unread_counts assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 401: {"detail":"Not authenticated","status_code":401} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

failure.message: AssertionError: Should have at least 1 test transfer assert 0 >= 1 + where 0 = len([])
